name: Sunbird
description: Open-source digital infrastructure for learning, designed as building blocks for education platforms. Powers India's DIKSHA platform serving millions of teachers and learners. Supports content management, credentialing, and telemetry.

name: OpenEdX
description: Open-source platform for creating, delivering, and analyzing online courses. Originally developed by MIT and Harvard for edX, now used by governments and universities worldwide for MOOC and blended learning delivery.

name: Atingi
description: Digital learning platform supported by GIZ providing free access to educational content focused on skills development in developing countries. Built on open-source components with a focus on mobile-first access.
